features: Fresh Active - The Nivea Men deodorant spray offers 48 hours of safe deodorant protection and long-lasting freshness for the skin thanks to the unique Infinifresh technology.
Aluminium free - The deodorant for men with refreshing sea extracts effectively and reliably protects against sweat and body odour, without aluminium (ACH).
Care complex - The proven Nivea Men care complex with antibacterial active ingredients ensures the optimal combination of freshness, care and effective protection.
Easy to use - Spray the men's deodorant under the armpit from 15 cm away and allow to dry. Skin compatibility is dermatologically tested.

Box contents & details: Nivea Men Fresh Active deodorant spray (150 ml), men's deodorant with 48-hour long-lasting protection and sea extracts, Nivea deodorant spray without aluminium, item number 81600
description: Product Description Nivea Men Fresh Active deodorant spray - long-lasting freshness and effective protection. The Nivea Men Fresh Active Spray offers effective and reliable deodorant protection against sweat and body odour for 48 hours, without aluminium (ACH). The unique Infinifresh formula ensures long-lasting freshness and contains the proven Nivea Men care complex with highly effective, antibacterial active ingredients and promises the optimal combination of freshness, Nivea care and effective protection. Skin compatibility is dermatologically tested. For men who expect long-lasting freshness: Nivea Men Fresh Active deodorant spray. The aluminium tin (without spray head and valve) is made from 100% recycled aluminium. Application: The men's deodorant is best used after showering. Spray the spray deodorant from 15 cm away under the armpit and allow to dry completely before dressing. The product advantages in detail: 0% aluminium (ACH). 48-hour deodorant protection with Nivea Men care complex. With antibacterial agents and sea extracts. Optimal combination: freshness, care and protection. Skin compatibility dermatologically tested. Warning: Hazard: Extremely flammable aerosol. Pressurised container: may burst when heated. Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other sources of ignition. Do not smoke. Do not spray against open flame or other source of ignition. Do not spray into eyes. Do not use on irritated or damaged skin. Do not pierce or burn, even after use. Use only according to intended use. Protect from sunlight. Do not expose to temperatures above 50°C. Keep out of reach of children. Only put emptied cans in the recycling collection. Ingredients Butane,Alcohol Denat.,Isobutane,Propane,Parfum,Octenidine HCl,Ethylhexylglycerin,Maris Limus Extract,Ostrea Shell Extract,Persea Gratissima Oil,Octyldodecanol,Propylene Glycol,Aqua,Sodium Benzoate,Potassium Sorbate,Lactic Acid,Benzophenone,Linalool,Limonene,geraniol,citronellol,alpha-isomethyl ionone,eugenol,citral Directions Spray the men's deodorant under the armpit from 15 cm away and allow to dry.
